title: ClawShield Security Policy Schema
description: Schema for ClawShield security policy YAML files.

denylist.description: Tools that are explicitly denied (checked before allowlist).

domain_allowlist.description: Domains allowed for web.* tool calls. Supports wildcard prefix (e.g. *.example.com).

arg_filters.description: Regex filters applied to tool arguments to detect sensitive data.

tool.description: Tool name to apply the filter to.

regex.description: Regular expression pattern to match against arguments.

evaluation_timeout_ms.description: Maximum time in milliseconds for policy evaluation per message.

max_message_bytes.description: Maximum size of incoming JSON-RPC messages in bytes.
